questions.question: Describe the main difference between Hierarchical Clustering and Partitional Clustering algorithms. Provide an example to support your answer.
Compare and contrast the Euclidean Distance and Manhattan Distance proximity measures. Explain when to use each measure in a clustering algorithm.
How does the K-Means algorithm work, and what is the role of the 'k' parameter in this algorithm? Provide a simple example to illustrate how K-Means partitions the data.
